Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class GrantsPanelFX.GrantRow

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.GrantsPanelFX.GrantRow
Enclosing class:
GrantsPanelFX
public static class GrantsPanelFX.GrantRow extends Object
A simple data class (POJO) used to represent a row in the grants TableView. It wraps a Grant object, formatting some fields (like amount) as Strings for display.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GrantRow(Grant g)
    Constructs a GrantRow from a Grant object.

  • Constructor Details

    • GrantRow

      GrantRow(Grant g)
      Constructs a GrantRow from a Grant object. Initializes all fields by extracting and formatting data from the given grant.
      Parameters:
      g - The Grant object from which to create the row data. Must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • getGrantId

      public String getGrantId()
      Gets the grant ID.
      Returns:
      The grant ID string.

    • getGrantor

      public String getGrantor()
      Gets the name of the grantor.
      Returns:
      The grantor's name.

    • getAmount

      public String getAmount()
      Gets the formatted amount of the grant.
      Returns:
      The grant amount as a currency-formatted string (e.g., "$1,000.00").

    • getDateAwarded

      public String getDateAwarded()
      Gets the date the grant was awarded.
      Returns:
      The date awarded, as a string.

    • getPurpose

      public String getPurpose()
      Gets the purpose of the grant.
      Returns:
      The purpose string.

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Gets the status of the grant.
      Returns:
      The status string.
